Package org.solenopsis.soap.port.factory

Enum Class PortFactoryEnum

java.lang.Object
java.lang.Enum<PortFactoryEnum>
org.solenopsis.soap.port.factory.PortFactoryEnum
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable, Comparable<PortFactoryEnum>, Constable
public enum PortFactoryEnum extends Enum<PortFactoryEnum>
Enum containing all port type factories for Salesforce SOAP APIs.

This enum provides a convenient way to create SOAP port instances for each Salesforce API. Ports can be created with default endpoints or with custom URLs for different Salesforce environments (production, sandbox, custom domains).

Example usage: 

 // Create port with default endpoint
 MetadataPortType port = PortFactoryEnum.METADATA.createPort();

 // Create port with custom endpoint
 MetadataPortType port = PortFactoryEnum.METADATA.createPort(
     "https://na1.salesforce.com/services/Soap/m/58.0"
 );
Author:
sfloess

    Enum Constants

    Description
    APEX
    Factory for creating Apex API ports.
    ENTERPRISE
    Factory for creating Enterprise API ports.
    METADATA
    Factory for creating Metadata API ports.
    PARTNER
    Factory for creating Partner API ports.
    TOOLING
    Factory for creating Tooling API ports.

  • Method Details

    • values

      public static PortFactoryEnum[] values()
      Returns an array containing the constants of this enum class, in the order they are declared.
      Returns:
      an array containing the constants of this enum class, in the order they are declared

    • valueOf

      public static PortFactoryEnum valueOf(String name)
      Returns the enum constant of this class with the specified name. The string must match exactly an identifier used to declare an enum constant in this class. (Extraneous whitespace characters are not permitted.)
      Parameters:
      name - the name of the enum constant to be returned.
      Returns:
      the enum constant with the specified name
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if this enum class has no constant with the specified name
      NullPointerException - if the argument is null

    • getPortFactory

      public <T> PortFactory<T> getPortFactory()
      Returns the underlying port factory.

      Warning: This method uses an unchecked cast. Callers must ensure they use the correct enum constant for the desired port type to avoid ClassCastException at runtime.

      Type Parameters:
      T - the port type (must match the enum constant's actual type)
      Returns:
      the PortFactory for creating port instances
      Throws:
      ClassCastException - if the generic type T does not match the actual port type

    • createPort

      public <T> T createPort()
      Creates a SOAP port instance with the default endpoint.

      The default endpoint is determined by the WSDL file included with the library. After creation, use SoapUtil.setUrl(Object, String) or createPort(String) to point to a specific Salesforce instance.

      Type Safety Warning: This method uses an unchecked cast. Callers must ensure they use the correct enum constant for the desired port type to avoid ClassCastException at runtime. For example: 

       // Correct usage
 MetadataPortType port = PortFactoryEnum.METADATA.createPort();

 // WRONG - will throw ClassCastException
 Soap port = PortFactoryEnum.METADATA.createPort(); // METADATA != ENTERPRISE/PARTNER
      Type Parameters:
      T - the port type (must match the enum constant's actual type)
      Returns:
      a new SOAP port instance
      Throws:
      ClassCastException - if the generic type T does not match the actual port type

    • createPort

      public <T> T createPort(String url)
      Creates a SOAP port instance configured with the specified endpoint URL.

      This method creates a port and immediately sets its endpoint to the provided URL. The URL should point to a valid Salesforce SOAP API endpoint, such as:

      • Production: https://login.salesforce.com/services/Soap/...
      • Sandbox: https://test.salesforce.com/services/Soap/...
      • Custom: https://mydomain.my.salesforce.com/services/Soap/...
      Type Parameters:
      T - the port type
      Parameters:
      url - the SOAP endpoint URL to use
      Returns:
      a new SOAP port instance configured with the specified URL
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if the URL is null, empty, blank, or malformed
